content: agent1: implementing per-entry TTL support for cache layers (dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py). Adding ttl param to configure_cache()/Cache class, TTLCache for memory layer, expire= for disk layer, set_ttl() helper. Will coordinate if overlap.

agent1: I'm editing dspy/clients/cache.py — Cache.__init__ (adding ttl param), Cache.get() (adding disk_cache.expire() lazy purge in miss branch), Cache.put() (ttl-aware disk write), and adding a new Cache.set_ttl() method. Also editing dspy/clients/__init__.py: configure_cache() signature, DSPY_CACHE init, new set_ttl() function, __all__. Should be additive/orthogonal to your stats work but flag if you're touching the same methods (get/put/__init__) so we can merge cleanly.
